multidesign 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Class Reference and Design Patterns
    • Getting Started with multidesign

Package index

All functions

as_multidesign()
Convert to a Multidesign Object
bind_multidesign()
Combine multiple multidesign objects
block_indices()
Get Block Indices from a Multiblock Object
block_indices(<multiblock_list>)
Extract Block Indices from Multiblock Object
column_design()
Extract Column Design Information
cross_validate()
Execute Cross-Validation Over Folds
cv_rows()
Create Cross-validation Folds from Explicit Row Indices
design()
Extract Design Information
design(<hyperdesign>)
Extract Design Information from Hyperdesign
df_to_hyperdesign()
Convert a Data Frame to a Hyperdesign Object
fold_over()
Generate Cross-validation Folds
fold_over(<hyperdesign>)
Create Cross-Validation Folds from a Hyperdesign Object
hyperdesign()
Create a Hyperdesign Object
hyperdesign(<list>)
Construct a Hyperdesign Object
init_transform()
Initialize Transformation
init_transform(<hyperdesign>)
Initialize Transformation for Hyperdesign
is_cstacked()
Test if Multiblock Object is Column Stacked
is_rstacked()
Test if Multiblock Object is Row Stacked
multiblock()
Create a Multiblock Object
multiblock(<list>)
Create a Multiblock Object from a List of Matrices
multidesign()
Create a Multidesign Object
multiframe()
Create a Multiframe Object
multiframe(<list>)
Create a Multiframe from a List
multiframe(<matrix>)
Create a Multiframe from a Matrix
obs_group()
Create a Group of Observations from Matrix or List Data
observation()
Create an Observation Object
print(<cv_result>)
Print Method for cv_result Objects
print(<foldlist>)
Print Method for Foldlist Objects
print(<hyperdesign>)
Print Method for Hyperdesign Objects
print(<multiblock_list>)
Print Method for Multiblock Objects
print(<multidesign>)
Print Method for Multidesign Objects
print(<multiframe>)
Print Method for Multiframe Objects
print(<observation_set>)
Print Method for Observation Set Objects
print(<reduced_multidesign>)
Print Method for Reduced Multidesign Objects
reduce.multidesign()
Reduce Dimensionality of a Multidesign Object
select_variables()
Select Variables Based on Column Design
split(<multidesign>)
Split a Multidesign Object by Design Variables
split(<multiframe>)
Split a Multiframe by Design Variables
split_indices()
Split Indices by Variables
split_indices(<multidesign>)
Get Split Indices for a Multidesign Object
`[`(<observation_set>)
Extract Multiple Observations from Observation Set
`[[`(<observation_set>)
Extract Single Observation from Observation Set
subset(<hyperdesign>)
Subset a Hyperdesign Object
subset(<multidesign>)
Subset a Multidesign Object
subset(<multiframe>)
Subset a Multiframe Object
summarize_by()
Summarize Data Over Grouping Variables
summarize_by(<multidesign>)
Summarize a Multidesign Object by Design Variables
summarize_by(<multiframe>)
Summarize a Multiframe by Design Variables
summary(<cv_result>)
Summary Method for cv_result Objects
t(<multiblock_list>)
Transpose a Multiblock Object
xdata()
Extract Data Matrix
xdata(<hyperdesign>)
Extract Data Matrix from Hyperdesign
xdata(<multiframe>)
Extract Data Matrix from a Multiframe Object

Developed by Bradley R. Buchsbaum.
